name: Lar Sunstrider

sheet.name: Lar Sunstrider
sheet.background_story:
He's strict, quick, and impatient. But there's more than this to somebody with his troubled past.

He was born and grew up in a large family in a merchant capital, he lived in peace until he was about 8 years old, but at that point life changed.

He lost his brothers in a power outage and was headed for a life of misery. With the help of a suspicious stranger he had to survive in a odd world. But with his persistance and strength, he managed to reach full potential and escape hell. 

While haunted by memories of the past, he now works as a mercenary until he decide to do otherwise...


Ether Beasts Quest
Lars Sunstrider aided Doran and seven other pilgrims in battling an ether monster outside the Putrid Forest, earning a reward item for their efforts.

As dawn approaches, Lars decides to beatthe constant threat and heads towards the Coven's Lair.
